creator: kwm@rainbow-runner.nl
text:
slgtk doesn't build with the upcoming GNOME 2.32 update.
	This is probably a gtk problem.

Fix: Update to 0.7.6 lets it build.
	
How-To-Repeat: 	apply http://people.freebsd.org/~kwm/gnome-2.32.0-2.diff and
	try to build slgtk. Note this is a Work in progress patch, and most
	likely will be deleted when gnome 2.32 is committed to the FreeBSD ports.
